description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a black matte finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle has a prominent handguard with ribbed texturing for grip, and a carry handle integrated with iron sights on top of the receiver. The barrel is of standard length and is fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped and textured for secure handling. The overall design is compact and modular, suitable for urban environments and close-quarters use.
description: A black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, ribbed handguard, and iron sights, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the alignment of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, handguard, and carry handle with iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, pistol grip, and the back of the carry handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with details of the ejection port and magazine release.
